notes: Shopify store (storefront name "BiteSupply", https://bitesupply.com). Reuses the generic Shopify adapter (adapters/shopify.ts) via config-driven routing (shopify-config.ts): variant.sku -> supplier SKU, product.vendor -> brand, variant.price -> price, variant.available -> stock. Catalog discovered via /sitemap.xml -> sitemap_products_1..3.xml then pulled in full from /products.json?limit=250&page=N (~5,186 products across 21 pages). SKU+brand matching only; variant.barcode empty (no GTIN/UPC, so no lot/expiry barcode hook), same limitation as our other Shopify-sourced suppliers. Cloudflare in front (server: cloudflare, cf-ray) but the JSON data endpoints return 200 logged-out; throttle paging (~0.4s) as with DDI/Davis. Net32 winning seller (195 wins). Verified live 2026-07-01: products.json 200, Accutron AC-21178 (Accutron Inc) = $43.70, 0/1000 sampled variants across pages 1/5/12/20 carried a barcode.
